agent.name: Change Impact Agent
agent.description: Analyses the impact of a requirement change across all downstream artifacts (BRD, FSD, User Stories, Architecture, DB Design, API Spec, Screen Spec, Test Cases) and produces a Change Impact Report with effort estimates.

input.description: The changed requirement and all downstream document IDs for impact analysis

required_fields.description: Clear description of what changed in the requirement (what was there before, what it is now)
List of FR/NFR/BR IDs that changed (e.g. ['FR-005', 'FR-011'])
ID of the current (updated) Requirement Summary document
Full markdown content of the current Requirement Summary

optional_fields.description: ID of the BRD document to analyse for impact
ID of the FSD document to analyse for impact
Full markdown content of the FSD
ID of the API Specification to analyse for impact
Full markdown content of the API Specification
ID of the Database Design document to analyse for impact
ID of the Screen Specification to analyse for impact
ID of the Test Cases document to analyse for impact
Additional context about why the change was made

constraints: changed_requirement_ids must contain at least one ID
Combined input must not exceed 32,000 characters per call

output.description: Change Impact Report saved to the documents table

sections.description: What changed, why it changed, and overall impact severity (Low / Medium / High / Critical)
Actionable recommendations (e.g. 'Re-run BA Agent for FSD sections 3.2–3.4')

responsibilities: Identify every downstream artifact affected by the changed requirement IDs
Assess impact on BRD, FSD, User Stories, Architecture, DB Design, API Spec, Screen Spec, and Test Cases
Flag any API changes that are breaking (require client-side updates or migrations)
Flag any database changes that require a migration script
Estimate implementation effort per layer in days
Recommend which upstream agents need to be re-run
Do NOT resolve or implement any changes — analysis and recommendations only
Do NOT assess impact on documents not provided as input

on_success.condition: Notify user. No automatic next agent — user decides which agents to re-run based on the report.

on_failure.message: Change Impact Agent failed to produce a report. Please check the input documents and retry.

office_behaviour.chat_bubble_on_handoff: Impact analysis complete: {affected_artifact_count} artifact(s) affected, ~{total_effort_days} day(s) estimated. Review required.
